programs.name: Austin Water — Bucks for Business
programs.description: Up to $100,000 per project utility rebate for commercial water conservation

programs.name: GoPurple Reuse Mandate
programs.description: Reuse mandate applies to buildings over 100,000 sq ft
programs.eligibility: Buildings >100,000 sqft in Austin Water service area

programs.name: Texas Water-Efficient Products Sales Tax Exemption
programs.description: 6.25% state + up to 2% local sales tax avoided on qualifying water-efficient equipment

programs.name: Water Conservation Property Tax Exemption (§11.32)
programs.description: 0%–100% of approved assessed value, dependent on local taxing-unit adoption

programs.name: Chapter 312 Tax Abatement
programs.description: County-dependent property tax abatement for qualifying projects

notes: Austin Water Bucks for Business + GoPurple mandate + state-level Texas programs
